$schema.description: Path to the JSON Schema for IDE validation

guard.description: Sugar that expands to PreToolUse deny rules. Block dangerous bash commands and file writes.

bash.description: Bash command patterns to deny. Substring match by default; wrap in /regex/ for regex.

files.description: File path glob patterns to protect from Write/Edit/MultiEdit.

allow.description: Sugar that expands to PermissionRequest allow rules. Auto-approve safe commands.

bash.description: Bash command patterns to auto-approve. Substring match by default; wrap in /regex/ for regex.

oneOf.description: Substring or /regex/ pattern to match against the bash command

on.description: Event hook rules. Maps Claude Code event names to arrays of rules.

PreToolUse.description: Fires before a tool executes. Can deny/allow/modify the tool call.

PostToolBatch.description: Fires after a batch of tool calls completes.

PermissionRequest.description: Fires when Claude Code shows a permission dialog. Can allow/deny.

PermissionDenied.description: Fires when a permission request is denied.

FileChanged.description: Fires when a file changes on disk.

Stop.description: Fires when Claude finishes responding. Can block with block_on_fail.

StopFailure.description: Fires when Claude's stop sequence fails.

SessionStart.description: Fires when a Claude Code session begins.

SessionEnd.description: Fires when a Claude Code session ends.

UserPromptSubmit.description: Fires when the user submits a prompt. Can block with exit code 2.

UserPromptExpansion.description: Fires when a user prompt is expanded.

Notification.description: Fires when Claude sends a notification.

WorktreeCreate.description: Fires when a git worktree is created.

WorktreeRemove.description: Fires when a git worktree is removed.

ConfigChange.description: Fires when Claude Code settings change.

TaskCompleted.description: Fires when a background task completes.

TaskCreated.description: Fires when a background task is created.

TeammateIdle.description: Fires when a teammate agent becomes idle.

InstructionsLoaded.description: Fires when CLAUDE.md instructions are loaded.

CwdChanged.description: Fires when the working directory changes.

ElicitationResult.description: Fires when an elicitation result is returned.

oneOf.description: Substring or /regex/ pattern. Block reason will be auto-generated.

match.description: Substring or /regex/ pattern to match against the bash command or file path

reason.description: Human-readable reason shown when this guard triggers

rule.description: A hook rule with an optional match condition and exactly one action.

match.description: When to fire this rule. Omit to match every occurrence.

run.description: Shell command(s) to execute. Exit 0 = success (silent). Exit 2 = block. Exit other = error context.

prompt.description: Text sent to Claude as additional context. Supports {template} variables.

http.description: POST the event JSON to a webhook. Response body parsed as a JSON decision.

agent.description: Prompt sent to Claude as an agent evaluation request. Supports {template} variables.

deny.description: Immediately deny the tool use or permission request with this reason. Supports {template} variables. Only for PreToolUse and PermissionRequest.

allow.description: Immediately allow the tool use or permission request.

updated_input.description: Modified tool_input to pass to the tool (allow only).

timeout.description: Seconds before the command is killed. Default: 55.

async.description: Run the command in the background without blocking Claude Code.

output.description: Parse command stdout as a JSON decision object.

block_on_fail.description: For Stop/SubagentStop: block Claude from stopping if the command exits non-zero.

match.description: Condition controlling when a rule fires.

oneOf.description: Shorthand: tool name (tool events) or substring/regex (UserPromptSubmit, Notification).
All specified conditions must match (AND semantics).

tool.description: Pipe-separated tool names or globs. E.g. "Bash", "Edit|Write", "mcp__github__*"

file.description: File path glob with brace expansion. E.g. "*.{ts,tsx}", ".env*", "src/**/*.py"

prompt.description: Substring or /regex/ matched against user_prompt (UserPromptSubmit only).

message.description: Substring or /regex/ matched against message (Notification only).

^input\\..description: Dotpath into tool_input matched as substring or /regex/. E.g. "input.command": "/sudo/"

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers. Values support {template} variables.
